title: YTPMV: WizBad35 Challenge
description:
Videos with YTPMV in the title get more views for some reason.

Yeah, sorry about the two week break between videos there, I'll try to not do that again.

I tried to be a little more original with the visuals on this one; there's absolutely no horizontal flipping.
The end is pure shit, I know, I was just sick of working on it and wanted to finish it today.

Kthx for 800 subs too.

Also, Mexicans Red-Heads and Asians.
